findings.location: source: 作成する機能の説明 (steps 1–4)
findings.description: The entire '作成する機能の説明' section is omitted. This section contains the batch execution command including the Nablarch JSR352 entry point class `nablarch.fw.batch.ee.Main` and the job-name argument pattern (`-Dexec.args=zip-code-truncate-table`). An AI agent answering 'how do I run a JSR352 batch?' needs to know the main class and invocation pattern: `mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass=nablarch.fw.batch.ee.Main -Dexec.args={job-name}`.
PascalCase class names that appear in the Java code example are missing from hints: `AppDbConnection`, `DbConnectionContext`, `SqlPStatement`.
findings.source_evidence:
final AppDbConnection conn = DbConnectionContext.getConnection();
final SqlPStatement statement = conn.prepareStatement("TRUNCATE TABLE " + tableName);
